MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON OCT-20-2020 IN 206, PLAINTIFFS MAHNAZ BADIHIAN AND JAHANGIR SADEGHI'S MOTION TO CONTINUE TRIAL DATE AND DISCOVERY CUT-OFF WAS HEARD. APPEARANCES VIA COURTCALL BY STEVEN MIYAKE, ESQ. FOR PLAINTIFFS AND JONATHAN BACON, ESQ. FOR DEFENDANTS GROVE STREET HAYES VALLEY, LLC AND CANNON CONSTRUCTORS NORTH, INC. THE COURT DID NOT RECEIVE COURTESY COPIES OF PLAINTIFFS' MOVING PAPERS PER LOCAL RULE 2.7(B) AND REQUIRED PLAINTIFFS' COUNSEL TO PAY A $60 FILING FEE ONLINE IN LIEU OF FILING A NEW MOTION. THE COURT FOUND GOOD CAUSE AND GRANTED THE MOTION CONDITIONAL ON THE PAYMENT OF THE $60 MOTION FILING FEE. THE TRIAL DATE OF 02/01/21 IS CONTINUED TO 06/07/21 IN DEPT. 206 AT 9:30 AM. ALL PRETRIAL DEADLINES GOVERNED BY THE NEW TRIAL DATE. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. MR. MIYAKE TO SERVE ORDER. JUDGE: GARRETT L. WONG; MATTER NOT REPORTED (206/GLW)

Motion To Strike Or Tax Costs
Off Calendar Aug-20-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

RULING: There being no appearance, the tentative ruling is adopted on DEFENDANT CANNON CONSTRUCTORS MORTH, INC.'S Motion To Strike Or Tax Costs, as follows:

GRANTED. No opposition filed. Plaintiffs' memorandum of costs filed June 26, 2019 is stricken as premature, as no judgment has been entered in the case, and the hearing on plaintiffs' motion for default judgment has been continued to September 26, 2019. (Cal. R. Ct. 3.1700(a),(b).)

Counsel for defendants is required to prepare a proposed order which states that the motion was not opposed and submit it to Department 302.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.
